title: Useful Foundation
description: Foundation mod of our series of mods
body:
<center>
  
  ![Useful Foundation](https://i.imgur.com/BaOt9en.png)
  
  This is a foundation mod. It adds useful materials and blocks into the game.  
  
  **This mod requires [TheMCBrosLib](/mod/themcbroslib)!**

  Report bugs and suggestions on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TheMCBrothers/Useful-Foundation/issues).

</center>


### Materials
- This mod adds copper, tin, bronze, nickel, invar, lead, silver, electrum and uranium.
- For each material there is an item for: Ingot, Nugget, Dust, Plate, Gear and Storage Block.
- Naturally generated materials also have an ore block


### Mods that use this as foundation
- [Useful Machinery](/mod/useful-machinery)


### Versions
- 1.20.4 (Supported)
- ~~1.20.2~~ (not planned)
- 1.20.1 (Bug Fixes)
- 1.19.X and older (END OF SUPPORT)
 

**Please feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!**

We don't have any plans to port the mod to older versions or to fabric!
